item.title: Tailscale Exit Node
item.description: Exclude Routes To exclude routes from exit node on Tailscale’s route table, run the following command. ip route add throw 10.42.0.0/16 table 52 This could be added to ExecStartPost override in systemd unit files.

item.title: Systemd Service Hardening
item.description: Create the user with $HOME at /run/<username> and configure RuntimeDirectory, so that systemd will create and chown the directory automatically.

item.title: SysRq key
item.description: /proc/sysrq-trigger For example, echo l > /proc/sysrq-trigger prints a stack backtrace for all active CPUs. CommandFunctionbWill immediately reboot the system without syncing or unmounting your disks.cWill perform a system crash and a crashdump will be taken if configured.dShows all locks that are held.eSend a SIGTERM to all processes, except for init.fWill call the oom killer to kill a memory hog process, but do not panic if nothing can be killed.gUsed by kgdb (kernel debugger)hWill display help (actually any other key than those listed here will display help.

item.title: Linux Map
item.description: Process Scheduling De-Prioritize Process Network TCP TCP Kernel Parameters SNMPv2 TCP Statistics BBR Firewall Firewalld nftables Administration SysRq key ...

item.description: mindmap root((DevOps)) Development Project Management Platform Support Coding Skills Architecture Trade-offs Performance Complexity Extensibility, e.g ...

item.title: systemd-analyze
item.description: Subcommands time: analyze startup time set-log-level: set systemd log level .

item.title: Projectile
item.description: Projects Broadly speaking, Projectile identifies projects like this: Directories that contain the special .projectile file Directories under version control (e.g ...

item.title: Module Search Path
item.description: sys.path is initialized from these locations: The directory containing the input script (or the current directory when no file is specified). PYTHONPATH (a list of directory names, with the same syntax as the shell variable PATH).
